about.label: About Elite
about.title: Your Trusted Partner in Global Auto Imports
about.p1: At Al Nokhba, we help you buy cars from U.S. auctions easily and safely. We provide full-service solutions including purchasing vehicles from Copart, IAAI, and Manheim auctions, towing from auction yards, storage, inspection, and overseas shipping to Iraq (Najaf, Baghdad, Basra), as well as Jordan and Dubai.
about.p2: We understand the market and work on your behalf to secure the best deal at the lowest cost.

items.title: 1. Buying Cars from US Auctions
items.description: We purchase vehicles on your behalf from top U.S. auctions like Copart, IAAI, and Manheim, with expert consultation to help you choose the right car.

items.title: 2. Inspection & Evaluation
items.description: We assist in inspecting and evaluating vehicles before purchase to minimize risks.

items.title: 3. Towing (Safe Transit)
items.description: We tow vehicles from auction yards to our warehouses safely and efficiently.

items.title: 4. Storage & Preparation
items.description: We provide temporary storage and prepare vehicles for shipping.

items.title: 5. International Shipping
items.description: Overseas shipping from the U.S. to Iraq (Najaf, Baghdad, Basra), Jordan, and Dubai.

items.title: 6. Shipment Tracking
items.description: We provide regular updates on your shipment until delivery.

footer.brandDesc: Contact us today and start your journey to import your car from the USA with ease and confidence.
footer.subscribeP: Subscribe to our latest car imports and auction deals.
